findings.issue: Forged zip files or compromised Downloads folder enable impersonation between instances
findings.recommended_fix: Implement cryptographic signing of all cross-instance handoffs with instance-specific keys

findings.issue: Courier loop could enable shame-based feedback via cross-instance coercion
findings.recommended_fix: Add instance-bound feedback framing to prevent cross-context psychological harm
Log all courier transfers to zeus.governance_events with content-hash, timestamp, and signing-instance metadata
